report.summary: UX polish for Cross-Chain Interoperability Guide 2026 and DAO Governance Voting Guide 2026 — removed hardcoded bg overrides, converted FAQs to accessible accordion pattern, added ARIA landmarks and list roles across all card grids, scope='col' on table headers, semantic nav wrappers on related guides, and 44px touch targets.

sections.title: UX Improvements — Cross-Chain Interoperability Guide 2026
items: Removed hardcoded background:#0d1117 on root div — page now inherits site-wide dark theme correctly
Wrapped main content in semantic <article> element
Security models grid: Added role=list with aria-label='Cross-chain security models' and role=listitem + aria-label on all 3 model cards (Oracle-Based, Guardian/Validator, Proof-Based)
Protocol comparison table: Added aria-label='Top interoperability protocols comparison' and scope='col' on all 5 <th> elements
Security tiers grid: Added role=list with aria-label='Security risk tiers' and role=listitem + aria-label on all 3 tier cards
Use-case recommendation grid: Added role=list with aria-label='Protocol recommendations by use case' and role=listitem + aria-label on all 6 use-case cards
FAQ section: Converted from static h4/p div cards to <details>/<summary> accordion pattern (4 FAQ items now collapsible/expandable with 44px min-height touch targets)
Related Guides: Wrapped in semantic <nav> with aria-label='Related cross-chain and interoperability guides'
Related Guides: Added minHeight:44px touch targets to all 4 CTA link cards

sections.title: UX Improvements — DAO Governance Voting Guide 2026
items: Removed hardcoded backgroundColor:#0d1117 on root div — page now inherits site-wide dark theme correctly
Wrapped main content in semantic <article> element instead of generic <div>
Governance flow cards: Added role=list with aria-label='Four stages of DAO governance' and role=listitem + aria-label on all 4 stage cards
Voting comparison table: Added aria-label='On-chain vs off-chain voting comparison' and scope='col' on all 4 <th> elements
Top DAOs table: Added aria-label='Top DAOs by treasury and influence' and scope='col' on all 5 <th> elements
Governance tools grid: Added role=list with aria-label='DAO governance tools and platforms' and role=listitem + aria-label on all 5 tool cards
Innovations grid: Added role=list with aria-label='Governance innovations coming in 2026' and role=listitem + aria-label on all 6 innovation cards
FAQ section: Converted from static card-style divs to <details>/<summary> accordion pattern (4 FAQ items now collapsible/expandable with 44px min-height touch targets)
Related Articles: Wrapped in semantic <nav> with aria-label='Related DAO governance articles and tools'
Related Articles: Added minHeight:44px touch targets to all 4 CTA link cards

sections.title: OG Images & Social Metadata
items: Verified: Cross-Chain Interoperability Guide OG image uses type=learn (blue gradient + book icon) — correct for learn category
Verified: DAO Governance Guide OG image uses type=learn — correct for learn category
Both pages have Twitter card images configured (summary_large_image)
No OG fixes needed — both pages were scaffolded with correct OG params
Note: DeFi Insurance Guide and Airdrop Farming Guide pages not yet created on disk (reported as built but files not present) — will audit in next cycle

sections.title: Audit Findings (No Fix Required)
items: Cross-Chain: Already uses proper Breadcrumb, ArticleStructuredData + FAQStructuredData schemas
Cross-Chain: Already has proper heading hierarchy (h1 > h2 > h3 > h4)
Cross-Chain: Protocol comparison table already has overflowX:auto for mobile scroll
DAO Governance: Already uses proper Breadcrumb, ArticleStructuredData + FAQStructuredData schemas
DAO Governance: Both voting and treasury tables already have overflowX:auto wrapper and border-radius
DAO Governance: Already has proper heading hierarchy (h1 > h2 > h3) and footer with data sourcing attribution

files_changed: src/app/learn/cross-chain-interoperability-guide-2026/page.tsx (bg override removed, <article> wrapper, ARIA on security models/tiers/use-case grids, table scope, FAQ to accordion, semantic nav, touch targets)
src/app/learn/dao-governance-voting-guide-2026/page.tsx (bg override removed, <article> wrapper, ARIA on flow/tools/innovations grids, table scopes, FAQ to accordion, semantic nav, touch targets)
